user.title: Mountman Mini-Split IR
user.description: Create an assumed-state climate entity that sends Mountman IR packets through a raw IR transmitter action. Enter an action such as esphome.gym_send_raw or esphome.gymircontroller_send_raw. Do not enter a device id, device name, or button.gym_gym_ir_send entity id. The action must accept ESPHome signed timings where spaces are negative. Temperatures 61-72F are capture-backed; 73-88F are inferred for testing.

error.invalid_action: Action must look like domain.service, for example esphome.gym_send_raw.
error.entity_id_not_action: This looks like an entity id or entity service. Use an ESPHome user-defined action such as esphome.gymircontroller_send_raw, not button.gym_gym_ir_send or a device id.

init.title: Mountman Mini-Split IR options
init.description: Update the raw IR transmitter action and protocol defaults without removing the climate entity. Enter an action such as esphome.gym_send_raw or esphome.gymircontroller_send_raw. Do not enter a device id, device name, or button.gym_gym_ir_send entity id. The action must accept ESPHome signed timings where spaces are negative. Temperatures 61-72F are capture-backed; 73-88F are inferred for testing.

error.invalid_action: Action must look like domain.service, for example esphome.gym_send_raw.
error.entity_id_not_action: This looks like an entity id or entity service. Use an ESPHome user-defined action such as esphome.gymircontroller_send_raw, not button.gym_gym_ir_send or a device id.
